headline: Assessing Mosaic (MOS) Valuation After Rare Earths Partnership And Uberaba Project Progress
summary: Mosaic (MOS) is drawing fresh attention after expanding into rare earths through a partnership with Rainbow Rare Earths Ltd. to advance the Uberaba project in Brazil, with a goal of producing separated rare earth oxides by 2030. See our latest analysis for Mosaic. Recent rare earths news and supply concerns around the Strait of Hormuz have come alongside a 24.94% 3 month share price return and 13.88% 1 year total shareholder return. However, the 3 year total shareholder return of 26.77%...

headline: Is Mosaic (MOS) Quietly Recasting Its Fertilizer Identity With Brazil Rare Earths And Steady Payouts?
summary: The Mosaic Company recently affirmed a quarterly dividend of US$0.2200 per share and, earlier this month, detailed its plan to jointly develop the Uberaba rare earths project in Brazil with Rainbow Rare Earths, aiming to process phosphogypsum into rare earth oxides by 2030. This combination of ongoing shareholder returns and a move to extract additional value from existing fertilizer operations by entering rare earth production could reshape how investors view Mosaic’s business mix and risk...
